PROP-baseauction-inv-048.text: Most recent timestamp wins between streams and feed fallback; stale source never overrides fresh source.
PROP-baseauction-inv-048.assertion: forall _getAssetPrice: use dataFeed only if dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt

locations.note: Timestamp comparison: dataFeed used only when dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt per function natspec
